name: Settings - API token generation flow (authenticated)
description: After mock login, navigate to /settings. Verify the API Tokens section is visible, generate a new token, confirm the token appears with its prefix and a copy prompt, then verify it appears in the active tokens list.

planSteps.description: The page shows an 'API Tokens' section heading and a button or input to generate a new token — not a login wall
In the token name input field, type: hackathon-test-token
Click the Generate button to create the API token
A new token value is displayed on screen — the page shows a message like 'Copy this token now. You won\'t be able to see it again.' along with the token string
The newly created token named 'hackathon-test-token' appears in the active tokens list with its prefix followed by masked characters (e.g., mtz_••••)
